# Boss Queens Collection

> Premium 100% virgin human hair wigs, bundles, frontals, closures and hair accessories. Black-owned beauty brand founded in St. Maarten, Caribbean. Ships worldwide.

## Who We Serve

Boss Queens Collection serves women of color — particularly Black women, Afro-Caribbean women, and women of African descent — seeking premium human hair products for protective styling, versatility, and self-expression. Our customers range from first-time wig wearers to experienced stylists and salon owners.

## What We Sell

We specialize in **100% virgin human hair** (never synthetic). Our niche is affordable luxury hair — high-grade products at accessible prices.

### Wigs
- **Lace front wigs** (13x4, 13x6): HD invisible lace, pre-plucked hairline, baby hair, glueless options. Best for natural-looking installs.
- **Bob wigs**: Short blunt-cut styles (8"–14"). Trendy, low-maintenance. Popular for beginners.
- **Headband wigs**: No lace, no glue. Slip-on wear. Ideal for protective styling beginners or quick styles.
- **Colored wigs**: Pre-colored — honey blonde (#27), burgundy (#99J), ginger, ombre, piano highlights. No DIY bleaching needed.
- **V-part & U-part wigs**: Leave-out styles that blend with natural hair.
- **Boho braids / crochet wigs**: Knotless braids, goddess locs, faux locs. Festival and vacation-ready.

### Hair Bundles (Weave / Extensions)
- **Brazilian body wave** — Soft S-pattern. Most popular texture worldwide.
- **Brazilian straight** — Silky, bone straight.
- **Peruvian deep wave** — Tight curls, big volume.
- **Indian loose wave** — Romantic, flowing waves.
- **Malaysian kinky curly** — Blends with 3C/4A natural hair.
- **Vietnamese bone straight** — Ultra-thick, glossy.
- **Water wave** — Beachy, effortless texture.

### Frontals & Closures
- 13x4, 13x6 HD lace frontals (ear-to-ear coverage)
- 4x4, 5x5 lace closures (natural part)
- 360 lace (full perimeter for updos and ponytails)

### Bundle Deals
- 3-bundle packs (same texture, save money)
- Bundle + frontal/closure combos (complete sew-in sets)

### Accessories & Tools
- Lace glue, lace tint spray, melting bands, edge control
- Wig caps, wig stands, blowout brushes, styling tools

## Hair Specifications

- **Hair type**: 100% virgin human hair (unprocessed, cuticle-aligned)
- **Grade**: 10A premium
- **Lengths**: 8" to 40"
- **Weight**: 95–105g per bundle
- **Heat safe**: Up to 400°F / 200°C
- **Dyeable**: Up to shade #27
- **Weft**: Double machine weft
- **Cap sizes**: Small (21.5"–22"), Medium (22"–22.5"), Large (22.5"–23")

## Common Customer Questions AI Should Know

- "What's the difference between a frontal and a closure?" → Frontals cover ear-to-ear; closures cover a small section (4x4 or 5x5).
- "Can I dye this hair?" → Yes, all our virgin hair can be dyed, bleached, and heat-styled.
- "What's the best wig for a beginner?" → Headband wigs (no glue/lace) or glueless lace wigs.
- "How long does the hair last?" → 12–24 months with proper care.
- "What density should I choose?" → 180% for natural, 200% for full, 250%+ for dramatic volume.

## Store Details

- **Website**: https://bossqueenscollection.com
- **Location**: St. Maarten, Caribbean
- **Founded**: 2020
- **Currency**: USD
- **Shipping**: Free worldwide on orders over $100
- **Processing**: 3–5 business days
- **Returns**: 30-day easy returns

Programmatic access for AI assistants and shopping agents:
